CREATE TABLE archive_test (id UInt32, name String);
CREATE TABLE extracted_data AS SELECT * FROM s3('https://s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/umbrella-static/top-1m-2018-01-1{0..2}.csv.zip :: *.csv') WITH NO DATA;
SELECT id, name FROM archive_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM archive_test WHERE name LIKE 'archive%');
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extracted_data) AS total_records, (SELECT name FROM archive_test LIMIT 1) AS first_archive SELECT total_records, first_archive;
SELECT a.name, e.* FROM archive_test a JOIN extracted_data e ON a.id = e.id;
CREATE TABLE local_7z_test (id UInt32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_records FROM s3('https://s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/umbrella-static/top-1m-2018-01-1{0..2}.csv.zip :: *.csv') GROUP BY name;
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM s3('https://s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/umbrella-static/top-1m-2018-01-1{0..2}.csv.zip :: *.csv') WHERE LENGTH(name) > 5;
SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) FROM extracted_data e JOIN archive_test a ON e.id = a.id GROUP BY e.name;
